summary: Add the Workbench local actor facade and persistence foundation without changing route behavior.
rationale: WorkbenchStore is a red-zone BFF persistence boundary. This PR preserves local owner scoping while preparing removal of Workbench admin/password login in staged steps.
verification: uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_local_actor.py::test_workbench_store_ensures_local_actor_once tests/test_workbench_store_decoupling.py tests/test_workbench_auth_security.py -q
